summary: Match-Making Module V2 Phase 1 Testing Complete - 20/20 backend tests passed, all frontend flows verified. New landing page with 2 buttons, issuer registration with CIN/GSTIN validation, wallet economy, and dashboard features all working correctly.

backend: 2. test_user_login - Regular user login with test@example.com/test123
3. test_get_wallet - GET /api/matchmaker/wallet returns wallet with credits and tokens
8. test_get_issuer_profile - GET /api/matchmaker/issuer/profile returns profile or null
15. test_get_connections - GET /api/matchmaker/connections returns sent and received
17. test_valid_cin_patterns - CIN regex matches valid formats
18. test_invalid_cin_patterns - CIN regex rejects invalid formats
19. test_valid_gstin_patterns - GSTIN regex matches valid formats
20. test_invalid_gstin_patterns - GSTIN regex rejects invalid formats
frontend: 1. /matchmaker shows new landing page with 2 buttons: IPO Bound Company and Subject Matter Experts
2. IPO Bound Company button navigates to /matchmaker/issuer
3. Subject Matter Experts button navigates to /matchmaker/experts
4. /matchmaker/experts shows old MatchMaker module with 15 professional categories
5. /matchmaker/experts shows AI matching section with 'Get AI Recommendations' button
6. Issuer Registration form has all required fields: company_name, cin, gstin, mobile, email, listing_intent, contact_persona, hiring toggle
7. Registration form validates required fields before submission
8. Registration form email is pre-filled with user's email
9. Successful registration shows success toast and redirects to dashboard
10. Issuer Dashboard shows 3 stat cards: Available Credits, IPO Readiness Score, Expert Consultations
11. Issuer Dashboard shows Company Profile with CIN, GSTIN, Contact, Timeline, Hiring status
12. Issuer Dashboard shows MCA Auto-filled Data (MOCKED) section
13. Top Up Credits button opens dialog
14. Top Up dialog shows MOCKED warning message
15. Top Up dialog shows credit pack options (5, 10, 25)
16. Top Up dialog has Pay (MOCKED) button

matchmaker_landing_page.description: /matchmaker shows new landing page with 2 buttons for IPO Bound Company and Subject Matter Experts

issuer_registration.description: Registration form with CIN/GSTIN validation, MCA auto-fill (MOCKED), all required fields

wallet_economy.description: Default 5 issuer_credits + 3 expert_tokens, top-up functionality (MOCKED Razorpay)

issuer_dashboard.description: 3 stat cards (credits, readiness score, consultations), company profile, MCA data

expert_dashboard.description: Stats for tokens, leads unlocked, active invitations

connections_api.description: GET /api/matchmaker/connections returns sent and received connections

masked_contacts.description: GET /api/matchmaker/issuer/leads returns masked email/mobile for non-unlocked leads

MCA21_GSTN_API.description: MCA auto-fill returns hardcoded address, date_of_incorporation, authorized_capital

Razorpay_Payment.description: Wallet top-up instantly credits wallet without actual payment

context_for_next_testing_agent: Match-Making Module V2 Phase 1 fully tested. New routes: /matchmaker (landing), /matchmaker/experts (old MatchMaker), /matchmaker/issuer (registration/dashboard). Test user test@example.com has issuer profile 'Test Corp' with 20 credits. New user test_issuer_9410@example.com has issuer profile 'Test IPO Corp' with 5 credits. CIN/GSTIN validation working. MCA API and Razorpay are MOCKED. Default wallet: 5 issuer_credits + 3 expert_tokens. Connection request deducts 1 credit/token.
